next_steps: Perform biopsy of the affected orbital tissue/optic nerve sheath
Serum IgG subclass 1-4 analysis and IgG4/IgG ratio calculation
Antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA) testing (PR3 and MPO)
Serum ANA, ENA, and anti-dsDNA antibody testing
Serum soluble IL-2 receptor levels for potential sarcoidosis
PET-CT scan to evaluate for systemic involvement (e.g., retroperitoneal fibrosis, lymphadenopathy, or aortitis)
Consultation with rheumatology and ophthalmology for consideration of systemic immunosuppressive therapy
